achievements.title: Performance Champion
achievements.description: Consistently delivered performance improvements across projects, achieving up to 35% faster page loads and 20% better rendering times.

achievements.title: Code Quality Leader
achievements.description: Conducted 100+ PR reviews with 95% first-time approval rate, establishing coding standards and best practices for the team.

achievements.title: Team Mentor
achievements.description: Mentored 2 junior developers, increasing their productivity by 25% through code reviews, pair programming, and knowledge sharing.

achievements.title: Scale Achievement
achievements.description: Built and optimized features serving 500,000+ active users on a major trading platform with zero downtime.

achievements.title: Consistent Delivery
achievements.description: Maintained 100% on-time project delivery record through effective planning, communication, and agile methodologies.

achievements.title: Architecture Design
achievements.description: Designed scalable frontend architectures that improved application scalability by 30% while maintaining code maintainability.
